name: PatchTST
paper: A Time Series is Worth 64 Words: Long-term Forecasting with Transformers
description: PatchTST is a transformer-based models for multivariate time series forecasting and self-supervised representation learning. It is based on two key components: (i) segmentation of time series into subseries-level patches which are served as input tokens to Transformer; (ii) channel-independence where each channel contains a single univariate time series that shares the same embedding and Transformer weights across all the series.
bibtex: @inproceedings{Yuqietal-2023-PatchTST,title = {A Time Series is Worth 64 Words: Long-term Forecasting with Transformers},author = {Nie, Yuqi and H. Nguyen, Nam and Sinthong, Phanwadee and Kalagnanam, Jayant},booktitle = {International Conference on Learning Representations},year= {2023}}
